body:
This time I present you "Blood Devil Sword" Data Pack.
This is a data pack
This data pack gives you a custom recipe for blood devil sword
this sword is very powerful it's has 1024 attack damage
this is very usefull until you take damege from any thing this 
sword such your hp/Hearts from you and provide you only half heart/ 1 hp.
so use this sword very carefully.
Blood Devil Sword recipe provided in the images.


it can win battle for you or make you loose.

this data pack has its own texture pack.
Optifine required for the texture pack

without Optifine texture pack may not work properly.

Data Pack    -"Blood Devil Sword [dp]"
Texture Pack -"Blood Devil Sword [rp]"

Download both packs for proper experience.

This pack is supported both single player world and multiplayer servers.


version supported
form- 1.16 TO Latest version

make sure you check the file version before downloading the pack
all versions have separate files.


Enjoy the "Blood Devil Sword" Data Pack.


THANKS FOR DOWNLOAD.
